query: INSERT INTO categories (establishmentId, name, description, sortOrder, isActive) VALUES (210005, 'Sobremesas', 'Doces e sobremesas', 18, 1); SET @cat_sobre = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, sortOrder) VALUES (210005, @cat_sobre, 'Café Espresso', '', '9.90', 'active', 1), (210005, @cat_sobre, 'Sorvete na Taça', '', '14.90', 'active', 2), (210005, @cat_sobre, 'Petit Gâteau', '', '29.90', 'active', 3), (210005, @cat_sobre, 'Sequência de Fondue Doce', '', '34.90', 'active', 4);
